code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  mut start = -1
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i <= n
    mut is_sep = true
    if i < n
      match string.byte_at(s, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b != 32 and b != 9 and b != 13
          is_sep = false
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
    if is_sep
      if start >= 0
        let tok = string.substring(s, start, i)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          result = list.push(result, v)
        when None
          ()
        end
        start = -1
      end
    else
      if start < 0
        start = i
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn sort_desc(_ items: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut remaining = items
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  while remaining.len() > 0
    let n = remaining.len()
    mut max_idx = 0
    mut max_val = 0
    match remaining.get(0)
    when Some(v)
      max_val = v
    when None
      ()
    end
    mut i = 1
    while i < n
      match remaining.get(i)
      when Some(v)
        if v > max_val
          max_val = v
          max_idx = i
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    result = list.push(result, max_val)
    mut new_rem: List<Int> = []
    mut j = 0
    while j < n
      if j != max_idx
        match remaining.get(j)
        when Some(v)
          new_rem = list.push(new_rem, v)
        when None
          ()
        end
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    remaining = new_rem
  end
  result
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let nums = parse_ints(line1)
let sorted = sort_desc(nums)
let k_str = string.trim(line2)
let k = match string.parse_int(k_str)
when Some(v)
  v
when None
  0
end

let total = sorted.len()
let count = if k > total
  total
else
  k
end

mut out = ""
mut idx = 0
while idx < count
  match sorted.get(idx)
  when Some(v)
    if idx == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  idx = idx + 1
end
println(out)
